title: Lateral Movement: Account Authenticating from Multiple Sources
description: Detects a single account performing network logons (LogonType 3) from 3+ distinct source IPs — indicates lateral movement sweep or compromised credential reuse.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Event ID' = 4624 and 'Logon Type' = 3) and not (('Target User Name' = 'ANONYMOUS LOGON' or 'Target User Name' = '-')) and not ('Target User Name' like '*$'))
falsepositives: Domain admin accounts from multiple workstations
